title: Playtime Ranks
description: Track your playtime, unlock ranks, and climb the leaderboard just by being active!
body:
⚙️ How It Works

Every second a player is online is tracked.

On first login, the mod imports existing vanilla statistics so players don’t start from zero.

Reaching configured milestones automatically grants ranks.

Rank-ups are broadcast server-wide while progress is silently saved in the background.

No maintenance required once configured.

🎮 Commands
Command	Description
/playtime	View your total playtime
/playtime me	Alias for /playtime
/playtime ranks	View configured rank milestones
/playtime top	Displays the server leaderboard
/playtime refresh	Manually refresh your rank
🏆 Example Milestones

(Default values — fully configurable)

1 Hour → Nomad

6 Hours → Noble

24 Hours → Veteran

Create as many ranks as you want — from early-game recognition to ultra-prestige tiers.

💬 Messaging

Server Broadcast

PlayerX ranked up to Noble! (6h 0m)


Private Save Notification

[PlaytimeRewards] Progress saved.


All messages can be edited in the config.

🔥 Why Use Playtime Rewards?

✅ Encourages long-term player retention
✅ Creates organic progression without economy inflation
✅ Adds prestige without gameplay advantages
✅ Fully automated once installed
✅ Lightweight and server-friendly

Ideal for community-focused servers that want players recognized for commitment.

⭐ Optional Rank Types

Playtime Rewards works great alongside community roles:

Supporter Ranks

Donator — Recognition for players who financially support the server.
Booster — Awarded to members who boost your Discord.

(These ranks are cosmetic and provide no gameplay advantages.)

Staff Ranks

Moderator — Trusted players who assist the community and enforce rules.
Admin — Server leaders responsible for operations, events, and staff management.

🧭 Progression Philosophy

New players begin their journey as Nomads,
earn prestige as Nobles,
and ultimately become legendary Veterans.

Your server decides what comes next.
